titleStmt.title: SII 4.1153: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1153. (A.R. No. 286 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
¿ jayati vinayavarttī tyāgasatyaprasū tasthirataraguṇalakṣmīrddharmmanirmmāṇadakṣaḥ nijaviśadayaśaḥ śrī
ma kēsminnijavaṁśavāridhilasacchītāṁśuraṁsasthalabhrājadvīraramāriraṁsuranagha[*ḥ] śrībuddhavarmmā nṛpaḥ ji bhujāsikhaṇḍitaripustōma
nī dānasamudra Ityatulitaprakhyātanāmōnnataḥ [. *2] tadvaṁśajēṣvathaguṇavrajasaṁyutēgha gacchatsvanēkadharaṇījanavallabhēṣu . śrīkoṇḍyadēsaṭirabhūdvipulēṣu tēṣu śrī
durjjayānvayalasadgṛharatnadīpaḥ [. 3*] kaṇḍravāḍiviṣayaṁcca sa koṇḍaḥ kōnarāṣṭramalabhaddalitāriḥ . rājalāṁcchanasamunnatamudyadrājabhīmadharaṇīśvararatnāt [. 4*] tasmāt khyāta
vicāraśca jātaḥ pōtassutōttamaḥ . tasyānujō mahātējā bhīmō bhimaparākramaḥ [. 5*] rāyaḥ koṇḍōnakhōgaṇḍaḥ kētaḥ pōtassutōttamaḥ . bādaḥ paśupatirgguṇḍa Ityāsustanayā
stataḥ [. 6*] tatrāsīnmahanīyakīrttilatikākaṁddālavālōllasatsaujanyādimahāguṇaikavasatiḥ śrīkōnapōtaḥ kṛtī . jitvā yastrikaliṁggavallabhamahçō rājēṁdracōḍāya vai prādā
ddurjjayavaṁśarājatilakaḥ kāliṁgagaṇḍadvipāN [. 7*] yaḥ kulōttuṁggacōḍasya kāruṇyēnālabhadvibhuḥ . veṁggīṁdranāmadēyaṁ ca vēṁgīgrāmasahasrakaṁ [. 8*] tasya jēṣṭhō mahātējā rājarāja
nṛpōttamaḥ . tatputraḥ pōtabhūpālaśśatruhaṁttābhavadbhuvi [. 9*] putrau tasya yaśōdhanasyasumatēḥ pōtasya cūḍāmaṇērbhbhūpa va durjjayānvayavatāṁ śrīrājarājādhipaḥ . toṇḍa
ritō yēṣvavadhikaḥ krūrārinirddāraṇastoṇḍaścaṇḍaparākramō vitanutē kīrttyānaghōrvvīmmudā [. 10*] lakṣmīriva priyatamā va śaśvaduragādhipabhūṣaṇasya peddāṁbikāsya dharaṇīśva
nijakulāṁbudhicaṁdralēkhā . jātaḥ pratāpa
Digital edition of SII 4.1153 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
